author: draganrakita
content: <@755913785620824175> I wanted to discuss this. You did expectation 2, i think it is more correct to do expectation 1, wdyt?

author: misilva73
content: The most fair seems to be option 2 - if no state is being created, we should return it to the user. I also like that with option 2  the final gas returned does not depend on the amount of available reservoir at the start of the call. However, it does seem a bit more complex from an implementation perspective

author: spencer_tb
content: hmm 🤔 yep! will update it - 1 felt simpler but I do agree
